title: PPIP - Login during Onboarding - Share Data toggle is not present
scenario: Share Data toggle incorrectly appears in App Settings > General > Account for logged-in Poly users during onboarding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. On the Home screen, tap the menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to App Settings.
5. Observe the presence or absence of the "Share Data" toggle.
expected: No "Share Data" toggle should appear for logged-in users, as they automatically consent to data sharing.
